literal: To produce a sound or speech that is pleasing to the ear
To stimulate or provoke subjects under electronic surveillance to elicit responses
To provide temporary help or resources to support survival or management
To be related or connected to something
To become extremely anxious or emotionally agitated
To complete remaining minor tasks or resolve outstanding matters
To reduce available funds or restrict spending
An organization or operation managed with strict discipline and control

relabelled_senses.definition: A situation in which a person or object barely fits into a confined space; a very narrow or constricted fit.
A phrase used in marriage vows signifying that the marital union is intended to continue until the death of one spouse; a pledge of lifelong commitment.
On many occasions; repeatedly over a period of time.
Only the passage of time will reveal the outcome or truth; the result cannot be determined at present.
A petty criminal or small‑time thief; a person who commits minor crimes rather than serious offenses.
A variant expression for a petty burglar or small‑time thief; someone who commits minor burglaries rather than major crimes.
Time passes very quickly; a remark expressing the rapid passage of time.
There is little time available; there is not enough time to do something unless one acts quickly.
Time is passing; there is limited time remaining to act.
A period away from work or regular duties for rest, recreation, personal matters, or recovery.
The period regarded as the happiest, most enjoyable, or most memorable in a person's life.
Since a very long time; from a period so remote that it is beyond living memory or written record.
